title: Dataset v5 long-running plan — slow-leak-saturation (10+ minute episodes)
description: Long-window plan for the slow-leak-saturation family (D1.8) and any other multi-minute episodes. Per dataset-todo.md sizing, v5 targets ≥100 long-window (≥10 min) episodes — each run of this plan contributes ~2 long episodes plus baseline padding. Total runtime per run: ~30 minutes.
target_use: Adds D1.8 family + long-window episode coverage to v5-large.

scenarios.notes: D1.8 cartservice memory leak — sustained outage, ticket-worthy.
D1.8 paymentservice connection leak — sustained outage, ticket-worthy.
